page_description: Register managed Markdown SOPs that SigNoz alert rules can bind with sop_id and feed into SOP-grounded AI response strategy.
register_section_description: The browser submits only managed Markdown content and public metadata. Connector credentials remain server-side.
register_checksum_note: Checksum is generated from the Markdown body before submit.
binding_section_description: Verify that an alert label resolves to an approved SOP document.
documents_section_description: Latest registered documents available to SOP binding preview.
